name: dopamine-monorepo
description: Dopamine — gorgeous, next-generation visual effects & animated icons.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @dopaminefx/demo
scripts.build:packages: node tools/dopamine/src/cli.mjs build && npm run build -w @dopaminefx/core && npm run build -w @dopaminefx/effect-solarbloom -w @dopaminefx/effect-inkstroke -w @dopaminefx/effect-comic -w @dopaminefx/effect-fail -w @dopaminefx/effect-aurora -w @dopaminefx/effect-ripple -w @dopaminefx/effect-confetti -w @dopaminefx/effect-heartburst -w @dopaminefx/effect-lightning -w @dopaminefx/effect-halo -w @dopaminefx/effect-dots && npm run build -w @dopaminefx/effects && npm run build -w @dopaminefx/react
